channel.title: Day Path
channel.description: a technical Blog ✒ for my little studio

item.title: studio status report: 2026-04
item.description: Month 04 of 2026 witnessed the continued lack of the re-release of kintespace.com—still almost out the ‘door.’ This month was dominated by two blockers: 1. an illness that lasted over a seven days 2. errands and meetings required in response to losing my …
item.author: bryan.wilhite@gmail.com(Bryan Wilhite)

item.title: studio status report: 2026-03
item.description: Month 03 of 2026 continued not getting the re-release of kintespace.com almost out the ‘door.’ This delay is well within the realm of inexcusable! Here were my alleged blockers: - At the beginning of this month, I wrote in my notes, ’The time is long over…
item.author: bryan.wilhite@gmail.com(Bryan Wilhite)

item.title: studio status report: 2026-02
item.description: Month 02 of 2026 was still about not getting the re-release of kintespace.com almost out the ‘door’—just like last month! But the main reason for this extravagant delay (apart from more #day-job tech drama) was my major discovery of the ‘magazine cover’ l…
item.author: bryan.wilhite@gmail.com(Bryan Wilhite)

item.title: studio status report: 2026-01
item.description: Month 01 of 2026 was about not getting the re-release of kintespace.com almost out the ‘door’—even though well over 90% is done! The month was mostly spent on #day-job drama, including: - a new understanding of DDD aggregates and how Entity Framework supp…
item.author: bryan.wilhite@gmail.com(Bryan Wilhite)

item.title: studio status report: 2025-12
item.description: Month 12 of 2025 was about getting the re-release of kintespace.com almost out the ‘door’—well over 90% is done! I am seeing 16 days of work on kintespace.com in the Obsidian graph: the Obsidian graph of the month I will try to select notes below that cap…
item.author: bryan.wilhite@gmail.com(Bryan Wilhite)

item.title: studio status report: 2025-11
item.description: Month 11 of the imperial year 2025 was, first, about producing this Mermaid visualization based on the chalk scribbles from earlier: Mermaid diagram of the kintespace.com pipeline The second thing done was to start living inside of this visualization: I b…
item.author: bryan.wilhite@gmail.com(Bryan Wilhite)

item.title: studio status report: 2025-10
item.description: I instinctively procrastinated but eventually I had to face it: month 10 of 2025 was about addressing the end of support for Windows 10 in this Studio 😐 I tracked this miserable experience (miserable, largely because I tried too many times to upgrade to …
item.author: bryan.wilhite@gmail.com(Bryan Wilhite)

item.title: studio status report: 2025-09
item.description: Month 09 of 2025 was about actually working inside of this sketch: kintespace.com Publications stack This is a very rough rendering of the brand new Publications stack for kintespace.com. The layers of this stack starts with: 1. Markdown with Obsidian 2. …
item.author: bryan.wilhite@gmail.com(Bryan Wilhite)

item.title: studio status report: 2025-06

item.title: studio status report: 2025-05
item.description: month 05 of 2025 was about discovering the essential ‘boundary-crossing abstractions’ and rewriting Songhay.Player for the last time, really My discovery this month was so important to me that I actually broke the fourth wall and posted my words from my p…

item.title: studio status report: 2025-04
item.description: month 04 of 2025 was about envisioning a road map toward getting the next-generation b-roll player services working Currently, the Studio canvas shows two warnings directly related to player services: Obsidian Studio canvas detail What should emerge from …

item.title: studio status report: 2025-03
item.description: month 03 of 2025 was about another #day-job takeover, serious progress with Azure Functions and AzDO Selected notes for this month should show signs of major #day-job breakthroughs in the study of Azure Functions and the YAML pipelines of Azure DevOps (Az…
